pattern: Greedily extending the current segment until a repeat appears yields the fewest unique-character pieces because cutting any earlier is never forced.
hints: Scan left to right and keep a running set of characters in the piece you are building.
You only need to start a new piece when the next character already sits in the current piece.
Maintain the set of seen characters; when a character repeats, increment the count, reset the set, and re-add the current character.

edge_inputs.description: all identical characters cut every position
all distinct characters stay in one piece
repeat only at the very end

stress.description: long random string over a small alphabet to force many cuts
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    alpha = 'abcde'
    return [''.join(rng.choice(alpha) for _ in range(n))]
stress.note: small alphabet maximises repeats and partition count
